title: Blue 64-135cm Aluminium Telescopic Hiking Pole - Lightweight Collapsible Adjustable Walking Trekking Camping Stick for Men & Women - By Redwood
features: This lightweight, durable aluminium pole is ideal for holiday & travel when hiking, trekking & general walking.
It has a comfortable ergonomic PVC grip handle, plus mud basket to help avoid sinking into soft ground & the antishock feature is useful when descending steep hills.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
